adapted.headline: Administration & Finance Student | Customer-Facing Experience | AI & Process Automation Enthusiast
adapted.summary: Motivated Administration and Finance student with hands-on customer service experience in international, English-speaking environments and a strong aptitude for technology and business digitalization. Proficient in Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, and AI tools, with genuine interest in fintech and data-driven process improvement. Looking to bring organizational skills and a client-oriented mindset to a merchant-facing role at a global payments company.

experience.title: Waiter / Cashier / Host
bullets: Delivered customer service in English in an international setting, managing orders and client interactions simultaneously under high-volume conditions
Operated cash register and point-of-sale systems, ensuring accuracy in payment handling and end-of-shift reconciliation
Welcomed and coordinated guest flow as host, liaising with floor and kitchen teams to optimize the customer experience
Collaborated in fast-paced team environments, helping distribute tasks and maintain service quality across shifts

skills_primary: AI tools & business chatbots (Microsoft Azure AI)
skills_secondary: Spanish (native) — asset for Spanish-speaking merchant portfolios

education.degree: Higher Vocational Diploma in Business Administration & Finance (in progress)

education.institution: Universidad de Las Palmas de Gran Canaria

education.degree: Artificial Intelligence with Microsoft Azure Certificate

summary_of_changes: CV translated entirely into English as required for the Berlin English-speaking role
Headline repositioned around customer-facing profile and tech/AI aptitude — closest match to Account Manager requirements
Hospitality bullets reframed around client interaction, payment processing accuracy, and team coordination — the most transferable skills to merchant relationship management
Cash/POS experience explicitly highlighted as tangential to Adyen's payments industry context
'Customer relationship management' promoted to top of primary skills as a rephrasing of 'atención al cliente', the closest available match to the JD core requirement
Microsoft Azure AI and AI tools retained in primary skills to signal a tech-forward mindset and adaptability
Spanish native fluency repositioned as a potential business asset (Spanish-speaking merchant segments)

Confidence set low (0.22): candidate has no fintech or payments background, no formal account management experience, very limited professional history (~1 month documented), and B1 English — well below the typical profile for an Account Manager role at a global fintech in Berlin
